summary: Verified that 'ALL' mode works correctly (440 items). Root cause was stale dev server running pre-K34-A1 code. Added additionalRoomIds to schedule API response. Fixed dashboard room filter to support secondary rooms.

rootCause.description: Dev server (PID 4556) was running code from before K34-A1. The unpatched object-rendering bug caused React crashes that prevented the schedule grid from rendering in ALL mode.
rootCause.fixAction: Restart dev server (taskkill /PID 4556 /F && npm run dev)

enhancements.change: Room filter checks item.additionalRoomIds for secondary room matching

manualSteps: Restart dev server: taskkill /PID 4556 /F && npm run dev
Select '全部显示' — should show 440+ courses
Select '第 1 周' — should show 412 courses
Filter by room with secondary room — should match

closureDecision.recommendedNextStage: K34-B (full import management) or real-use validation
